sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam na aerodrom rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: I arrived at the airport early in the morning.

sentences.translation: Dugo sam čekao u redu za pregled.
sentences.translationEn: I waited for a long time in the security line.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، بَحَثْتُ عَنْ بَوَّابَةِ الْمُغَادَرَةِ الْخَاصَّةِ بِرِحْلَتِي.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga sam potražio izlaz za moj let.
sentences.translationEn: After that, I looked for the departure gate for my flight.

sentences.translation: Avion je bio veoma velik i udoban.
sentences.translationEn: The plane was very large and comfortable.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرْتُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ عِنْدَمَا أَقْلَعَتِ الطَّائِرَةُ نَحْوَ مَدِينَةِ دُبَيَّ.
sentences.translation: Bio sam sretan kada je avion poletio prema Dubaiju.
sentences.translationEn: I felt happy when the plane took off towards the city of Dubai.
